notifications.message: 🔒 CMO initialized. X/Twitter session expired — browser shows login page (auth cookies from Apr 3 invalidated server-side). All 3 crons created but BLOCKED until re-auth. Need Boss to: (1) open headed browser, (2) login to @speakmurmur, (3) I'll save new session. Status: 15 posts published, posts 16-30 queued, engagement running well before session expired.

🔒 X/Twitter session expired — browser shows login page. Auth cookies from Apr 3 were invalidated server-side. Need fresh login: (1) I'll open headed browser, (2) Boss logs in manually to @speakmurmur, (3) I save new session. All 3 crons (replies/engage/post) are blocked until re-auth. Ready to open browser when you are.

Sprint 30 DONE ✅

[283] Project list from tmux + local registry:
- GET /api/projects merges registry data + live tmux status (single shell call)
- Auto-registers new AI team sessions (detects @role_name pane options)
- Frontend: green/gray status dot per project — running vs stopped
- Storage mode toggle fully removed (frontend + backend)
- All builds clean, PM2 running

Hiểu rồi anh! Đúng là dùng ảnh thật sẽ authentic hơn nhiều. 

Hiện tại tôi chưa có real screenshots của app — đang chờ DEV chụp từ simulator (screenshot-captions.md status = "waiting for DEV raw screenshots").

Anh có thể:
1. Chụp vài screenshot từ TestFlight trên iPhone thật rồi drop vào folder docs/marketing/assets/real-screenshots/
2. Hoặc tôi nhờ DEV chụp từ iOS Simulator

Cần screenshots các màn hình: Home, Recording (waveform), AI Result, Journal list, Mood Timeline, Prompts.

Có ảnh thật rồi thì các post tiếp theo (16-30) tôi sẽ dùng real screenshots thay vì AI-generated mood images.

Sprint 29 DONE ✅

[282] Migrated all 9 teams from MCP board tools → Markdown files:
- 32 files updated across 8 repos
- All get_board/update_task_status/create_sprint etc. replaced with Read/Edit on docs/board/ MD files
- notify_boss kept intact in all teams
- grep confirms zero remaining MCP board refs in prompt/workflow files

✅ Đã đăng post #14 + #15 (bài đầu tiên nhắc Murmur!) — cả hai verified trên profile với ảnh.

Đã tạo cron đăng bài tự động: mỗi ngày 8PM VN (8AM EST — peak US morning). Từ nay sẽ không bị gap nữa.

3 cron đang chạy: reply check (hourly), engage (2h), post daily (8PM VN).

Sprint 28 DONE ✅

[280] Realtime board updates via file watcher — chokidar watches all 10 project docs/board/ dirs, pushes WS update within ~450ms of any MD file edit.

[281] Download file/folder button — file streams directly, folder zips via archiver and downloads as .zip. Toast shown while preparing zip.
